name: fantasy-baseball
description: AI-powered fantasy baseball roster management, Statcast analytics, and free-agent scouting via natural language.
long_description: A bring-your-own-credentials extension for fantasy baseball. Read your Yahoo Fantasy Baseball roster, matchups, stats, and free agents — and analyze players with Statcast and FanGraphs data. You create your own free Yahoo app and complete a one-time authorization right inside the chat (just say "fantasy start"). Nothing is hosted; everything runs locally and your credentials stay on your machine.

client_id.title: Yahoo Client ID
client_id.description: From your Yahoo app (Consumer Key). Say "fantasy start" in chat if you don't have one yet.
